title: getphotospaginationfiltering
description: Verify that the GET /photos endpoint correctly retrieves photos with pagination and supports filtering by albumId and sorting by different sort modes such as DATE_NEW, DATE_OLD, NAME_A_Z, and NAME_Z_A.

title: addnewphoto
description: Verify that the POST /photos endpoint successfully adds a new photo with required fields albumId, originalPath, and filename, and returns the created photo with a 201 status code.

title: getphotobyid
description: Verify that the GET /photos/{photoId} endpoint retrieves the correct photo details when a valid photoId is provided, and returns 404 when the photoId does not exist.

title: deletephotobyid
description: Verify that the DELETE /photos/{photoId} endpoint deletes the specified photo when a valid photoId is provided, returning a 204 status code, and returns 404 if the photo does not exist.

title: getalbumslist
description: Verify that the GET /albums endpoint retrieves the list of all albums successfully with a 200 status code.

title: createalbum
description: Verify that the POST /albums endpoint creates a new album when provided with a valid name, returning the created album with a 201 status code.

title: createbackup
description: Verify that the POST /backup endpoint creates a backup of all photos and albums to Google Drive and returns backup details including backupId, timestamp, photosCount, and albumsCount with a 200 status code.

title: restorefrombackup
description: Verify that the POST /restore endpoint restores photos and albums from a Google Drive backup and returns the count of photosRestored and albumsRestored with a 200 status code.

title: capturephoto
description: Verify that the POST /camera/capture endpoint captures a photo using the device camera with specified albumId and quality, and returns the captured photo with a 201 status code.

title: searchphotos
description: Verify that the GET /search endpoint searches photos by query string and optionally filters by albumId, returning matching photos with a 200 status code.
